body.title: Ponder Stibbons device scaffold — human-facing coordinator
body.result: Ponder scaffold at devices/ponder/; BaseDevice/BaseShim + registry registration in main()
body.intention: I intend that Ponder Stibbons appears as a first-class device in the rack, named and described so his role as human-facing coordinator is clear to future sprints.
body.description:
Create devices/ponder/ with BaseDevice + BaseShim. Ponder is the Radar O'Reilly of UU: human-facing coordinator, bridges human<->system without needing to know internals, personable, not a leader. Register in skeleton flat-file registry. His fascia page will be the place for natural-language system-state queries in a future sprint.

**Affected files:** devices/ponder/__init__.py, devices/ponder/device.py, devices/ponder/shim.py
**Design rules:** no-sqlite; BaseDevice/BaseShim inheritance required
**Scope boundary:** Scaffold + role documentation only. No routing logic, no NLP, no system-state query handling. Out of scope: any actual coordinator functionality (that is a future M ticket once we design the query routing).
**Completion criteria:** `pip install -e .` succeeds; GET /api/device/list includes ponder; web UI shows Ponder tab with basic fascia; __init__.py docstring accurately describes the Radar equivalent role.
